Name: ClickUp
Content: ClickUp modernized its whiteboard for millions of users, replacing legacy infrastructure with the tldraw SDK.

Name: Padlet
Content: When Padlet saw an opportunity for a new whiteboard, they built it with tldraw—and shipped Sandbox in record time.

Name: Mobbin
Content: Faced with slow, rigid software, Mobbin used tldraw to build custom tools—faster than off-the-shelf solutions.

Name: Jam
Content: A collaborative bug reporting tool that helps teams capture issues, add context, and share feedback visually.

Name: Genio
Content: A collaborative notes app that captures and connects ideas in one space, blending notes, sketches, and real-time collaboration.

Name: Alai
Content: An AI presentation tool with smart blocks that adapt to your content, so you can focus on the message instead of formatting.

Name: LegendKeeper
Content: A worldbuilding platform for writers and game masters to design immersive worlds, linking characters, lore, and maps together on a shared canvas.

Name: CadChat
Content: A meeting tool for engineers that lets teams review CAD models together, markup in 2D, and annotate 3D snapshots in real time.

Name: Aries
Content: A financial workspace that gives traders a customizable canvas to arrange market data, analytics, and execution tools side by side.

Name: Dirac
Content: A manufacturing platform that transforms CAD files into interactive work instructions. Using an annotated canvas to clarify steps and capture feedback in real time.

Name: Matilda
Content: A tool for climate engineers to clean up and adjust building models in 2D, ensuring reliable data flows into energy analysis.

Name: Pollination
Content: A tool for climate engineers to clean up and adjust building models in 2D, ensuring reliable data flows into energy analysis.

Name: BigPi
Content: A platform for planning and knowledge work, where interactive charts, RFP responses, and documents all come together in one visual workspace.

Name: Grow Therapy
Content: A mental health platform with an interactive whiteboard built into telehealth visits, making therapy more accessible for visual learners and younger clients.
